A '''kdak''' was an ancient creature of [[Arda II]] that had a huge [[Slug/Legends|slug]]-like body, a [[Mouth/Legends|mouth]] surrounded by cilia-like feelers that could grab objects, a beak, nine [[Eye/Legends|eyes]], and a strange-smelling slime trail.

{{Creature-stub}}

*"[[As Long As We Live...]]" {{Reprint|As Long As We Live...}} {{1st}}
